notes: Fatal JavaScript syntax error due to duplicate function definitions and a malformed drawBall() stub with a stray closing brace, causing the entire script to fail to parse and the game to not run at all.
Fatal syntax error due to an extra closing brace and duplicated drawBall/drawPaddle functions prevents the game from running entirely.

The build has major script integrity issues with duplicated/mismatched draw functions causing likely parse/runtime failure, and even if corrected the paddle movement input is broken because update checks keys.left/keys.right before they are set for Space-triggered state transitions.
